revision_priority: Reclassify the Skills buckets so each header matches its contents, especially moving `Git/Shell/Scrum/Unit Testing` out of `APIs` and separating `PostgreSQL/MySQL` from `Cloud`.
Add one short bridge clause in Summary or the TikTok baseline that frames the prior security/ops/data work as transferable to Viant's data-heavy buy-side platform.
revision_instructions: In `## Skills`, keep the same technologies but rename the buckets so they are semantically accurate: move `Git`, `Shell`, `Scrum`, and `Unit Testing` out of `APIs` into a clearer `Engineering Practices` bucket; move `PostgreSQL` and `MySQL` out of `Cloud` into a `Datastores` or `Data/Infra` bucket, and keep actual cloud/infrastructure items together. In `Professional Summary` sentence 1 or the TikTok project baseline, add one concise bridge phrase that ties the prior security/ops/data workflows to Viant's buy-side, data-intensive platform work, for example by emphasizing low-latency, audit-heavy, ranking-oriented workflows. Do not remove any current JD must-have stack items or rewrite the experience structure.
